name: Quick Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can Kidney beans, drained (save the liquid; 15 oz)
1 cup "no salt added" canned tomato puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef in hot frying pan until lightly browned.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients.
4. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
This will make 4 servings of about 3/4 cup each.
Each serving contains 230 calories, 9 grams of fat (3 grams of saturated fat), 34 milligrams of cholesterol, and 390 milligrams of sodium.
